content.thinking:
Let me analyze the inputs from Bird and MJ for contradictions before producing any output.

Bird says: "Faceted filtering (by category, price range, brand) is explicitly out of scope for this release."
MJ says: "The service will also support faceted filtering by: category (term filter), price_min/price_max (range filter), brand (term filter)"

This is a direct contradiction. Bird explicitly scopes OUT faceted filtering, MJ explicitly scopes it IN.

I must escalate this and NOT produce a handoff brief.
